## Summary

Brief description of what this PR does and which module(s) it touches.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature or pattern
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint:all` passes
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` (or `npm run build:all`) passes
- [ ] `npm run test:all` passes (coverage thresholds enforced)
- [ ] `npm run build:all` passes
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior or API changed
- [ ] Config changes (ports, Redis, env) noted below if any

## Config / environment notes

_Optional._ List any port, Redis, or `.env` changes so reviewers can run your branch.
